Video.summary: Rob's talented, sleepwalking brother manages to audition successfully for The Alan Brady Show.
Video.title: The Sleeping Brother

Video.summary: Buddy laments the decline of the American male and yearns for the good old days.
Video.title: The Bad Old Days

Video.summary: Rob tries to help an old radio comedy writer make a comeback.
Video.title: The Return of Happy Spangler

Video.summary: Comedy writer Rob Petrie talks his wife Laura into leaving their sick son with a babysitter.
Video.title: The Sick Boy and The Sitter

Image.alt: The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter
The Sick Boy and The Sitter

Video.summary: Laura dyes her hair blonde when she fears the romance in her marriage is fading.
Video.title: My Blonde-Haired Brunette

Video.summary: Laura matches her cousin Thomas with Rob's co-writer, Sally, for a dinner party.
Video.title: Sally and the Lab Technician

Video.summary: Rob is torn between going to Washington, D.C. on business and attending Ritchie's school play.
Video.title: Washington vs. the Bunny

Video.summary: Laura begins to worry when Rob has to work nights with a beautiful television star.
Video.title: Jealousy!

Video.summary: Complications ensue when Mel tells Rob that he wants Laura to dance on The Alan Brady Show.
Video.title: To Tell or Not to Tell

Image.alt: To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell
To Tell or Not to Tell

Video.summary: Rob reluctantly agrees to take care of Buddy's dog for the weekend.
Video.title: The Unwelcome Houseguest

Video.summary: Rob fears he is no longer needed when his co-writers do a show without his help.
Video.title: The Meershaltz Pipe

Video.summary: Rob invites 44 fellow PTA members to his television show, but forgets all about it until air time.
Video.title: Forty-Four Tickets

Video.summary: Rob and Buddy treat Sally as one of the guys, even in the presence of Sally's date.
Video.title: Sally Is a Girl

Video.summary: Buddy leaves for job that sours.
Video.title: Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?

Image.alt: Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?
Buddy, Can You Spare a Job?

Video.summary: Unable to control her curiosity, Laura opens Rob's mail and she instantly regrets it!
Video.title: The Curious Thing About Women

Video.summary: Rob's pal Jerry strains their friendship when he starts knocking Rob's television show in public.
Video.title: Punch Thy Neighbor

Video.summary: Rob finds himself besieged by the parents of neighborhood prodigies.
Video.title: The Talented Neighborhood

Video.summary: While his wife is away, Buddy moves in with the Petries and quickly wears out his welcome.
Video.title: The Boarder Incident

Video.summary: Rob finds out that his six-year-old son is embarrassed to admit how his Dad makes a living.
Video.title: Father of the Week

Video.summary: Sally drags the entire gang to a bowling alley when she discovers a new dance sensation.
Video.title: The Twizzle

Video.summary: Laura is afraid to tell Rob that she doesn't like a necklace.
Video.title: Empress Carlotta's Necklace

Video.summary: Romance enters Sally's life in the form of an insurance salesman named Leo Fassbinder.
Video.title: Where You Been, Fassbinder?

Video.summary: Rob faces a dilemma when an old army pal must be told he cannot attend a special dinner party.
Video.title: Sol and the Sponsor

Video.summary: Rob invites an old Army pal home to dinner but begins to fear he has a jewel thief on his hands.
Video.title: Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO

Image.alt: Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO
Harrison B. Harding of Camp Crowder, MO

Video.summary: For Rob, a forgotten loan turns into a forgotten debt and a television script.
Video.title: Who Owes Who What?

Video.summary: Laura believes Rob, on jury duty, has been unfairly swayed by the beautiful blonde defendant.
Video.title: One Angry Man

Video.summary: Rob disguises his voice and asks Laura on a date.
Video.title: The Two Faces of Rob

Video.summary: Rob recalls his and Laura's attempts to get married when Ritchie brings up the subject.
Video.title: The Attempted Marriage

Video.summary: Rob is puzzled when he discovers Laura's secret bank account.
Video.title: Bank Book 6565696

Video.summary: A hypnotist visits a Petrie dinner party where Rob accidentally picks up a post-hypnotic suggestion.
Video.title: My Husband Is Not a Drunk

Image.alt: My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk
My Husband Is Not a Drunk

Video.summary: Rob grows increasingly concerned that Sally is falling for Ric Vallone.
Video.title: Like a Sister

Video.summary: Long day causes a spat between Petries.
Video.title: The Night the Roof Fell In

Image.alt: The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In
The Night the Roof Fell In

Video.summary: Rob suspects that Buddy and Sally may be moonlighting for another comedy show or having an affair.
Video.title: The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally

Image.alt: The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally
The Secret Life of Buddy and Sally

Video.summary: Ritchie claims he keeps being attacked by a giant woodpecker.
Video.title: A Bird in the Head Hurts

Image.alt: A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts
A Bird in the Head Hurts

Video.summary: While directing the annual variety show, Rob becomes frustrated by spousal jealousies.
Video.title: Somebody Has to Play Cleopatra

Video.summary: After a string of burglaries in the neighborhood, the Petrie home is pillaged.
Video.title: The Cat Burglar

Video.summary: Laura believes her marriage is threatened by a singing weather girl.
Video.title: The Foul Weather Girl

Video.summary: Rob describes Laura as a "nut" on TV.
Video.title: Ray Murdock's X-Ray

Video.summary: Rob fears a walnut will steal his imagination. Guest: Danny Thomas.
Video.title: It May Look Like a Walnut

Image.alt: It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut
It May Look Like a Walnut

Video.summary: Laura tries to break Rob of his expensive habit of picking up the check.
Video.title: My Husband Is a Check-Grabber

Video.summary: The Petries hire a painter who ends up painting much more than just their living room.
Video.title: Give Me Your Walls

Video.summary: Jacques Savon, who has played a curious part in both Rob's and Laura's pasts, suddenly reappears.
Video.title: The Square Triangle

Video.summary: Rob finds himself very out of place at a dinner party for celebrated literati.
Video.title: I'm No Henry Walden

Video.summary: Rob feels that he has betrayed his dentist friend when he lets another dentist work on his teeth.
Video.title: A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own

Image.alt: A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own

Video.summary: Rob leaves the show after Mel rejects his script and is upset when Buddy and Sally don't join him.
Video.title: I Was a Teenage Head Writer

Image.alt: I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer
I Was a Teenage Head Writer

Video.summary: Rob, Laura and the office gang put together a variety show to help out an old friend.
Video.title: The Sam Pomerantz Scandals
